mapper.select: SELECT param_id, param_code, param_name, param_value, param_type, description, updated_at FROM fx_sys_param ORDER BY param_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_sys_param (param_code, param_name, param_value, param_type, description, updated_at) VALUES (#{paramCode}, #{paramName}, #{paramValue}, #{paramType}, #{description}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE fx_sys_param SET param_name = #{paramName}, param_value = #{paramValue}, param_type = #{paramType}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE param_id = #{paramId}
